data.title: LS Cable & System to invest significantly in Chesapeake, VA, through 3 subsidiaries, marking largest capital investment in Hampton Roads region's history.
data.description: LS Cable & System Ltd. (LS C&S), a prominent player in power and communication cable solutions, recently revealed its intentions for a substantial investment in Chesapeake, Virginia. With three LS C&S subsidiaries involved, this project is anticipated to be the largest capital expenditure in the Hampton Roads area. This initiative adds to LS GreenLink's cutting-edge cable project that was previously announced. The investment signifies a major development for the region's economic landscape.

data.title: Teva (NYSE and TASE: TEVA) will discuss Q4 2025 financial results in a conference call on Jan 28, 2026, 8 a.m. ET.
data.description: Israeli company Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd. will release its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025 on Wednesday, January 28, 2026, at 7:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The announcement will be followed by a conference call and live webcast at 8:00 a.m. ET on the same day. Teva is listed on both the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) and the Tel Aviv Stock Exchange (TASE).

data.title: Zevra Therapeutics grants 53,000 shares of common stock to 3 new employees under Employment Inducement Award Plan.
data.description: CELEBRATION, Fla., December 12, 2025 - Zevra Therapeutics, Inc. (NasdaqGS: ZVRA), a company specializing in rare disease therapies, has announced the granting of Inducement Awards to new employees. These awards allow the purchase of 53,000 shares of the Company's common stock. The recipients will receive the shares over a four-year period, with 25% becoming available on the first anniversary of their start date, and the rest vesting in equal parts annually thereafter, contingent upon their continued employment.

data.title: FMC Corp (NYSE: FMC) declared quarterly dividend of 8 cents/share, payable Jan 15, 2026, to shareholders as of Dec 31.
data.description: In Philadelphia on December 12, 2025, FMC Corporation (NYSE: FMC) disclosed that its board of directors has approved a standard quarterly dividend of 8 cents per share. The dividend is set to be paid on January 15, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of December 31, 2025.

data.title: Archena Alagappan named associate portfolio manager to Neuberger Berman Real Estate Securities Income Fund. #NYSE #NRO
data.description: On December 12, 2025, Neuberger Berman Real Estate Securities Income Fund Inc. (NYSE American: NRO) revealed the appointment of Archena Alagappan as the associate portfolio manager of the Fund. Alagappan, who is currently serving as the Senior Vice President, is expected to assume the new role effective immediately. Her experience and expertise will contribute significantly to the Fund's operations moving forward.

data.title: Huntington Bancshares sets $356.25 quarterly cash dividend on its 5.70% Series I Preferred Stock.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, in Columbus, Ohio, Huntington Bancshares Incorporated declared a quarterly cash dividend on their 5.70% Series I Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock (Nasdaq: HBANM). The Board of Directors set aside $356.25 per share for this dividend.

data.title: KB Home opens 2 new communities in Crosswinds Master Plan, Morgan Hill, California, boosting housing options.
data.description: KB Home has revealed the launch of two new neighborhoods in the coveted Crosswinds Master Plan in Morgan Hill, California. This announcement signifies a significant step in expanding the housing options in the region. Residents and prospective home buyers now have more opportunities to explore and invest in the flourishing real estate market of Morgan Hill. The communities are strategically positioned within the Crosswinds Master Plan, enhancing the overall appeal of the area. This move is expected to attract a wide range of buyers looking for modern living spaces in a well-connected and thriving neighborhood.

data.title: Former AG Charles C. Foti Jr. and Kahn Swick & Foti investigate Soho House & Co Inc. sale to MCR affiliates - SHCO (NYSE).
data.description: An investigation is currently underway by former Louisiana Attorney General Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq. and the law firm Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, regarding the potential acquisition of Soho House & Co Inc. (NYSE: SHCO) by affiliates of MCR. The sale is being scrutinized for compliance and transparency. Key details concerning this proposed transaction will be examined thoroughly to ensure fairness and legality.

data.title: AMREP Corp's Q2 FY2026: Net income $1.2M, EPS $0.22 (vs. $4.04M, $0.75 last yr). Six-month net income $5.89M, EPS $1.09 (vs. $8.11M, $1.51 last yr). Revenues $9.4M ($11.9M) in Q2, $27.2M ($31M) six months. Land/homes sales revenue volatile. AMREP is a real estate leader in NM.
data.description: AMREP Corporation reported a decrease in net income for the 2026 fiscal second quarter ended October 31, 2025, with $1,200,000 compared to $4,042,000 for the same period in the previous year. For the first six months of 2026, the company had net income of $5,892,000 compared to $8,106,000 in 2025. Revenues also declined, with $9,398,000 in the second quarter and $27,250,000 for the first six months of 2026, compared to $11,906,000 and $30,997,000 for the same periods in 2025. AMREP Corporation noted that fluctuations in revenues are impacted by various factors including specific transactions and property types. The company operates in real estate development in New Mexico. More detailed financial information can be accessed through the company's financial statements on Form 10-Q.

data.title: Do Kwon, Terra founder, sentenced to 15 years in prison after impactful victim letters highlighted personal impact of Terra collapse.
data.description: Following the Terra collapse, victim letters conveying the personal impact were described as "impactful" by the judge. Subsequently, Do Kwon was sentenced to a prison term lasting 15 years.

data.title: 1st Detect Corp's mass spectrometry systems can reduce false alarms and enhance checkpoint screening, poised to support U.S. Aviation Security Modernization Initiative.
data.description: 1st Detect Corporation has implemented their detection and analysis mass spectrometry systems globally to enhance checkpoint screening by minimizing false alarms. These systems have been deployed worldwide to effectively strengthen security measures across various locations.

data.title: Donald Trump boosts marijuana stocks with reports of executive order easing federal restrictions, sparking rally.
data.description: On Friday, there was a surge in marijuana stocks following remarks made by Donald Trump. The increase was spurred by reports indicating an upcoming executive order that will relax federal regulations on the marijuana industry. This caused a notable rally in the stock market, especially in marijuana-related investments. The development was highlighted in an article by Investor's Business Daily, generating significant interest from investors. The precise extent of this rally and its impact on the market remains to be seen as investors closely monitor the situation and adjust their strategies accordingly.

data.title: Crescent Energy shareholders approve merger with Vital Energy (NYSE: VTLE). Expected to close on Dec 15, 2025.
data.description: Houston-based Crescent Energy Company (NYSE: CRGY) recently revealed that their stockholders have given resounding approval for the issuance of Crescent Class A common stock for the upcoming merger with Vital Energy, Inc. (NYSE: VTLE). The decision was made unanimous at a special stockholder meeting, setting the stage for the merger anticipated to be finalized on December 15, 2025. The company expressed satisfaction with the overwhelming backing provided by their shareholders in facilitating this significant corporate move.

data.title: Credicorp Ltd. (NYSE: BAP | BVL: BAP) sets schedule for 2026 quarterly results and calls.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, Credicorp Ltd. revealed its plans for the upcoming year to shareholders and the market. The company, listed as BAP on NYSE and BVL, disclosed the schedule for releasing its quarterly earnings in 2026. They will be hosting conference calls alongside these reports, providing opportunities for stakeholders to engage.

data.title: Bitnomial receives CFTC approval for US prediction markets, enabling support for crypto and economic event bets.
data.description: Bitnomial, a clearinghouse in the US, has received approval from regulators to enable support for prediction markets associated with cryptocurrency and economic events. This move allows for an expansion of its regulated product and clearing services.

data.title: Invitation Homes (NYSE: INVH) raises its quarterly cash dividend to $0.30 per share, up 3.4% from $0.29. Payable by Jan 16, 2026.
data.description: Invitation Homes Inc. (NYSE: INVH) has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.30 per share on its common stock, indicating a 3.4% rise from the previous quarterly dividend of $0.29 per share. This dividend marks a significant increase for stockholders, with payment scheduled on or before January 16, 2026, to holders of record. Invitation Homes, known as the nation’s leading single-family home leasing and management firm, continues to prioritize value for its investors through such strategic decisions.

data.title: TPG RE Finance Trust, Inc. declares $0.24/share cash dividend for Q4 2025, payable on Jan 23, 2026, to stockholders on record by Dec 26, 2025.
data.description: In New York, TPG RE Finance Trust, Inc. (NYSE: TRTX) declared a cash dividend of $0.24 per share for Q4 2025. The dividend, announced by the Board of Directors, is set to be paid on January 23, 2026, to common stockholders of record by December 26, 2025. TRTX is a commercial real estate finance company specializing in origination, acquisition, and management of primarily first mortgage loans secured by institut.

data.title: Vital Energy stockholders greenlight merger with Crescent Energy, filed with SEC, to close Dec 15.
data.description: In Tulsa, Oklahoma, on December 12, 2025, Vital Energy, Inc. (NYSE: VTLE) disclosed that during a special stockholder meeting, shareholders gave the green light to the planned merger with Crescent Energy Company ("Crescent"). Precise voting outcomes will be submitted via a Form 8-K to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The merger with Crescent is projected to be finalized by December 15, 2025.

US bank deposits fell to $18.479 trln from $18.528 trln in the prior week.
